column2: What do you want to remember?

Page changes and new page candidates
Showing the first 10 stale pages returned by the daemon.

Paste any list of facts or memories, one per line. Each line becomes a separate memory in Wenlan. Empty lines and separators (---, ===) are skipped. Optionally prefix lines with a type tag: [identity] - Lives in San Francisco [preference] - Prefers concise responses [lesson] - TDD caught a config regression before launch [gotcha] - Tauri rolling::daily suffixes file names with the date [fact] - Building Wenlan, a local-first AI memory app Lines without a tag are stored as facts.
